phase: Phase 1+2 complete — geo_elo and geo_directionality_score calculated
distribution_note: IMPORTANT: The fixed-opponent ELO algorithm (opponent always=1500) caps maximum achievable ELO at approximately 1993 for even the highest-win-rate traders. The pre-registration thresholds (LEGENDARY>=2175, ELITE>=1800) were calibrated for the multi-opponent comprehensive_elo which can reach 3300+. The 0-legendary result is an artifact of algorithm design, NOT evidence of low trader skill. The pre-registration explicitly permits threshold adjustment when 'the score distribution is materially different'. Phase 3 should use the adjusted thresholds below.

geo_legendary_adjusted.description: top ~3.4% of geo traders, n=15, functionally equivalent to comprehensive_elo LEGENDARY tier
geo_legendary_adjusted.note: Use geo_elo >= 1800 for LEGENDARY comparisons in Phase 3

geo_elite_adjusted.note: Use geo_elo >= 1700 for ELITE comparisons in Phase 3

geo_qualified_adjusted.note: Use geo_elo >= 1600 for QUALIFIED comparisons in Phase 3

phase3_instructions: Run accuracy check using geo_elo tiers on resolved geopolitics markets. Use accuracy_pool=1 for Pool A validation. CRITICAL: Use adjusted thresholds (LEGENDARY=1800, ELITE=1700, QUALIFIED=1600) because the fixed-opponent ELO caps at ~1993 max. Compare LEGENDARY/ELITE/QUALIFIED accuracy under geo_elo vs comprehensive_elo baseline (LEGENDARY 46%, QUALIFIED 65%). Also filter to geo_directionality_score >= 0.7 and report accuracy for that subset. Oscar must decide whether to accept adjusted thresholds before Phase 3 results can confirm H1.

algorithm.algorithm_note: Simple fixed-opponent ELO. Equilibrium ELO for a 90% win-rate trader is ~1882; for 80% win-rate ~1741. Alternative: player-vs-player within geo markets would generate higher scores and a Legendary tier at 2175.
